title: Overflow Control
description: Test your knowledge of how CSS handles content that overflows its container boundaries
referenceSolutions: overflow: auto adds scrollbars only when content overflows

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about CSS overflow

hints.text: The overflow property controls what happens when content is too large for its container. There are several values.
overflow: auto adds scrollbars only when content overflows. overflow: scroll always shows scrollbars. overflow: hidden clips content.
overflow: auto is the most user-friendly choice for scrollable containers because it only shows scrollbars when needed, unlike overflow: scroll which always shows them.
